'''Nils Wender''' was a minor Noble of [[House Calipsa]], a trained astrogator and captain of the ''[[Bright Seeker]]'' mining survey ship. He was in command of the ship when it encountered the ''[[Regal Destiny]]'' and its cargo of [[Theus Paddox]]'s long lost siblings.

{{Char-stub}}
